name: Mandulas Desszert (Almond Candy Dessert)
recipeIngredient: 8 squares (1 oz. each); semi-sweet baking chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Store these chocolate-almond candies in a tightly covered box in a cool place.
2. Place each candy in a tiny fluted paper or foil cup to serve. This is a delicious candy to offer guests after dinner.
3. In the top of a double boiler placed over gently boiling water, melt chocolate.
4. Stir in butter until melted. Keep chocolate mixture warm over hot water.
5. Cut each almond lengthwise into several pieces.
6. In a small skillet over low heat, combine almonds and sugar; toast, stirring, until lightly browned.
7. Add to melted chocolate mixture. Remove from heat and drop chocolate-almond mixture by spoonfuls onto waxed paper.
8. Let stand until cooled and hardened.
